6:
SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'SME' THEN y.Consumption ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'LAM' THEN y.Consumption ELSE NULL END) AS SME_LAM_diff,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'LAM' THEN y.Consumption ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'KAM' THEN y.Consumption ELSE NULL END) AS LAM_KAM_diff,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'KAM' THEN y.Consumption ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'SME' THEN y.Consumption ELSE NULL END) AS KAM_SME_diff
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
AND y.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(y2.Consumption) FROM yearmonth y2 JOIN customers c2 ON y2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID WHERE c2.Currency = 'CZK' AND y2.Date LIKE '2013-%')	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS GrowthPercentage
FROM
    yearmonth y
JOIN
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
JOIN
    transactions_1k t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND y.Date = strftime('%Y-%m-%d', t.Date)
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    GrowthPercentage DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
